member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Plugin configuration.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableNudity
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether nudity filtering is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableImmodesty
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether immodesty filtering is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableViolence
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether violence filtering is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableProfanity
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether profanity filtering is enabled.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.NudityThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the confidence threshold for nudity detection (0.0 to 1.0). Higher values = more strict filtering, only high-confidence detections.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ImmodestyThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the confidence threshold for immodesty detection (0.0 to 1.0). Higher values = more strict filtering, only high-confidence detections. Revealing-clothing and partial-skin scenes typically score 0.05–0.40; lower this threshold to catch more borderline content.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ViolenceThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the confidence threshold for violence detection (0.0 to 1.0). Higher values = more strict filtering, only high-confidence detections. NOTE: The violence classifier outputs a baseline of ~0.50 for all action/war movie content. Thresholds below 0.65 will false-positive on virtually every scene in action films. Set to 0.65+ to catch only truly explicit violence.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.ProfanityThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the confidence threshold for profanity detection (0.0 to 1.0). Higher values = more strict filtering, only high-confidence detections.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.Sensitivity
member.summary: Gets or sets the sensitivity level (strict, moderate, permissive).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SegmentDirectory
member.summary: Gets or sets the segment directory path.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.PreferCommunityData
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to prefer community data over AI data.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.AiServiceBaseUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the AI service base URL.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.EnableOsdFeedback
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to enable OSD feedback during filtering.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.JellyfinMediaPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin media root path as seen by Jellyfin (host or container path). Used to remap paths when forwarding analysis requests to AI services. Example: /data/media/movies (Jellyfin Docker default) Leave empty to pass paths through unchanged.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.AiServiceMediaPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the media root path as seen by the AI service containers. Example: /mnt/media Only used when JellyfinMediaPath is also set.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.NudityConfirmationMinImmodesty
member.summary: Gets or sets a minimum immodesty score required to confirm a nudity detection. When greater than 0.0, nudity-only detections (high nudity but near-zero immodesty) are rejected as false positives. Recommended: 0.05. Set to 0.0 to disable confirmation and flag on nudity score alone.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SceneDetectionMethod
member.summary: Gets or sets the scene detection method (ffmpeg, sampling, transnetv2).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.FfmpegSceneThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the FFmpeg scene detection threshold (0.0 to 1.0). Used when SceneDetectionMethod is "ffmpeg".

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SamplingIntervalSeconds
member.summary: Gets or sets the sampling interval in seconds. Used when SceneDetectionMethod is "sampling".

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.SceneSampleCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of frames sampled per detected scene. Higher values increase catch-rate for short content but increase analysis time.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.WithSensitivityThresholds
member.summary: Returns a copy of this configuration with NSFW and violence thresholds derived from the preset, overriding the individual slider values.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.SensitivityThresholds
member.summary: Maps the Sensitivity preset string to concrete score thresholds per content category. Lower thresholds = more aggressive filtering (more content is caught). Immodesty uses a lower threshold than nudity because revealing-clothing scenes score in the 0.15–0.40 range on the NSFW model, while explicit nudity scores 0.60+.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.SensitivityThresholds.GetThresholds(System.String)
member.summary:
Returns (NudityThreshold, ImmodestyThreshold, ViolenceThreshold) for the given sensitivity preset.
strict0.25 / 0.05 / 0.65 — catches most content including borderline reveals
moderate0.50 / 0.10 / 0.70 — balanced (default)
permissive0.75 / 0.30 / 0.80 — only very-high-confidence content
Violence thresholds are set high (0.65+) because the violence classifier outputs a noise floor of ~0.50 for all action/war content; lower values cause false positives on virtually every scene in action films.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Controllers.PureFinSegmentsController
member.summary: Admin-only endpoints for inspecting PureFin segment data.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Controllers.PureFinSegmentsController.GetSegments(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets PureFin segment data for a specific media item.
member.returns: Segment data for the media item.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Controllers.PureFinSegmentsController.GetQueueStatus
member.summary: Gets analysis queue status from the AI orchestrator.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Controllers.PureFinSegmentsController.PauseQueue(Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Controllers.PureFinSegmentsController.QueuePauseRequest)
member.summary: Pauses analysis queue processing.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Controllers.PureFinSegmentsController.ResumeQueue
member.summary: Resumes analysis queue processing.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Controllers.PureFinSegmentsController.QueuePauseRequest
member.summary: Request payload for pausing queue processing.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Controllers.PureFinSegmentsController.QueuePauseRequest.Reason
member.summary: Gets or sets optional pause reason.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.Segment
member.summary: Represents a content filter segment with timing and category information.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.Segment.Start
member.summary: Gets the start time in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.Segment.End
member.summary: Gets the end time in seconds.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.Segment.RawScores
member.summary: Gets the raw AI confidence scores for all detected categories (0.0-1.0). These are the original AI model outputs before any threshold filtering.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.Segment.Categories
member.summary: Gets the content categories (e.g., nudity, violence, profanity) that exceed current thresholds. This is computed dynamically based on current configuration settings.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.Segment.Action
member.summary: Gets the action to take (skip, mute, blur).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.Segment.Confidence
member.summary: Gets the highest confidence score from RawScores (0.0-1.0).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.Segment.Source
member.summary: Gets the source of the segment (ai, community, manual).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.Segment.Duration
member.summary: Gets the duration of the segment in seconds.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.Segment.ShouldFilter(Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Determines if this segment should be filtered based on current configuration thresholds.
member.param: Current plugin configuration with threshold settings.
member.returns: True if any category exceeds its threshold and is enabled.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.Segment.GetActiveCategories(Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Gets the categories that exceed current thresholds (for display/logging).
member.param: Current plugin configuration with threshold settings.
member.returns: Array of category names that exceed their thresholds.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.SegmentData
member.summary: Represents segment data for a media item.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.SegmentData.MediaId
member.summary: Gets the media item ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.SegmentData.Version
member.summary: Gets the version number.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.SegmentData.Segments
member.summary: Gets the segments.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.SegmentData.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when this data was created.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.SegmentData.FileHash
member.summary: Gets the media file hash for change detection.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Plugin
member.summary: The main plugin class for PureFin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the current plugin instance.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.PluginServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers PureFin plugin services with Jellyfin's DI container.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.PluginEntryPoint
member.summary: Hosted service for PureFin plugin initialization.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.PluginEntryPoint.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory,MediaBrowser.Controller.Session.ISessionManager,Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.SegmentStore)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.PlaybackMonitor
member.summary: Monitors playback sessions and applies content filtering.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.PlaybackMonitor.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Controller.Session.ISessionManager,Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.SegmentStore,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.PlaybackMonitor})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.SegmentStore
member.summary: In-memory store for segment data with file system persistence.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.SegmentStore.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.SegmentStore})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.SegmentStore.Get(System.String)
member.summary: Gets segment data for a media item.
member.returns: Segment data if found, null otherwise.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.SegmentStore.GetActiveSegments(System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Gets active segments at a specific timestamp.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.SegmentStore.GetSegmentsOverlappingRange(System.String,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Gets segments that overlap a time range.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.SegmentStore.GetNextBoundary(System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Gets the next segment boundary after a timestamp.
member.returns: Next segment start time, or null if no upcoming segments.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.SegmentStore.Put(System.String,Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Models.SegmentData)
member.summary: Stores segment data for a media item.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.SegmentStore.LoadAll
member.summary: Loads all segment files from the segment directory.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.SegmentStore.ReloadAll
member.summary: Reloads all segment data from disk. Useful when configuration changes or new segments are generated.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Tasks.AnalyzeLibraryTask
member.summary: Scheduled task to analyze library content.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Tasks.AnalyzeLibraryTask.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.ILibraryManager,Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Services.SegmentStore,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Tasks.AnalyzeLibraryTask},System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Tasks.AnalyzeLibraryTask.ConvertToContainerPath(System.String,Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Configuration.PluginConfiguration)
member.summary: Convert a Jellyfin file path to the path accessible by the AI service containers, using the JellyfinMediaPath → AiServiceMediaPath mapping from plugin configuration.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Tasks.AnalyzeLibraryTask.SceneAnalyzerResponse
member.summary: Response model for scene analyzer API.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Tasks.AnalyzeLibraryTask.SceneResult
member.summary: Scene result from analyzer.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.ContentFilter.Tasks.AnalyzeLibraryTask.SceneAnalysis
member.summary: Scene analysis data.
